violations.text: Drain pipes was observed draining directly into hand sink in back storage area. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (beverages) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025

Staff failed to sanitize coffee equipment after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Establishment was lacking chlorine. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025
(Beverages) were observed stored on the floor in the (walk in cooler and back storage area). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025
Leakage observed at the plumbing under the 3 bay sink.PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025
Outside refuse areas observed with an accumulation of litter, trash, and other debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2025
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024
The hand sink, located in the back area, was observed to have drain pipe draining directly into sink. Hand sinks are designated for hand washing only. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (milk) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024
Drinks were observed stored on the floor in the walk- in cooler and back storage area Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024
